Rendering snapshots for Lit web components.

-- match_str_highlight --
<match-str text="hello world" start="0" end="5"></match-str>

<span class="matchstr">hello</span> world

-- match_str_no_bounds --
<match-str text="hello world"></match-str>

hello world

-- match_str_bounds_at_end --
<match-str text="hello world" start="6" end="11"></match-str>

hello <span class="matchstr">world</span>

-- match_line_with_bounds --
<match-line lineNo="10" text="hello" href="#L10" start="0" end="5"></match-line>

<a class="lno-link matchlno" href="#L10"><span class="lno">10</span></a>
            <span class="matchline"><match-str end="5" start="0" text="hello"><span class="matchstr">hello</span></match-str></span>

-- match_line_context --
<match-line lineNo="9" text="// context" href="#L9"></match-line>

<a class="lno-link" href="#L9"><span class="lno">9</span></a>
            <span>// context</span>

-- filename_match --
<filename-match text="main.go" href="/view/myrepo@abc/+/main.go" start="0" end="4" repo="myrepo" version="abc123"></filename-match>

<div class="filename-match">
            <a class="header label result-path" href="/view/myrepo@abc/+/main.go">
                <span class="repo">myrepo:</span><span class="version">abc123:</span><match-str end="4" start="0" text="main.go"><span class="matchstr">main</span>.go</match-str>
            </a>
        </div>
